#JaanSeGuzarteHain

Dil Pe Zakham Dil Pe Zakhm Khaate Hain  
Jaan Se Guzarte Hain

Dil Pe Zakhm Khaate Hain  Jaan Se Guzarte Hain 
Dil Pe Zakhm Khaate Hain  
Jaan Se Guzarte Hain 
 
Jurm Sirf Itna Hai  
Jurm Sirf Itna Hai  
Unko Pyaar Karte Hain 
 
Aitbaar Badhta Hai  
Aur Bhi Mohabbat Ka Aitbaar Badhta Hai  
Aur Bhi Mohabbat Ka 
Jab Woh Ajnabi Bankar  
Paas Se Guzarte Hain 
 
Dil Pe Zakhm Khaate Hain  Jaan Se Guzarte Hain 
Dil Pe Zakhm Khaate Hain  
Jaan Se Guzarte Hain 
 
Wo jo pher kar nazrein Paas se guzarte hain 
Wo jo pher kar nazrein 
Paas se guzarte hain 
E gham-e-zamana hum 
Tujhko Yaad karte hain 
 
Dil Pe Zakhm Khaate Hain  Jaan Se Guzarte Hain 
Dil Pe Zakhm Khaate Hain  Jaan Se Guzarte Hain 
Dil Pe Zakhm Khaate Hain  
Jaan Se Guzarte Hain 
 
Jurm Sirf Itna Hai  
Jurm Sirf Itna Hai  
Unko Pyaar Karte Hain

snippet.title: Matka King - Official Trailer | Vijay Varma, Kritika Kamra, Gulshan Grover | NAGRAJ MANJULE
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Matka King Official Trailer
Starring Vijay Varma, Kritika Kamra, Sai Tamhankar, Bhupendra Jadawat, Siddharth Jadhav, Gulshan Grover, Bharat Jadhav, Girish Kulkarni, Jamie Lever, Kishor Kadam, Cyrus Sahukar, Arpita Sethiya, Sambhaji Tangade, Ishtiyak Khan, Sanjivv Jotangia, Simran Ashwini
Produced by - Siddharth Roy Kapur, Nagraj Popatrao Manjule, Gargi Kulkarni, Ashwini Sidwani, Ashish Aryan
Created and Written by - Abhay koranne & Nagraj popatrao Manjule
Created & Directed by - Nagraj popatrao Manjule

Official Release Date - April 17, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Spanning the years 1964 to 1975, Matka King is the story of Brij Bhatti, an enterprising cotton trader who teams up with a disgraced ex-soldier and an upper-class widow to start a gambling game called ‚ÄėMatka‚Äô, turning an elite hobby into a parallel economy and an alternative system for a generation that feels let down by the country as it settles into life as a free republic.

Welcome to my channel!
I create Mashup, Fan-Made, and Concept Trailers by combining and editing footage from one or multiple movies. These trailers offer a fresh take on existing films, reimagine stories, or even create entirely new movie concepts.
Mashup trailers are a creative way to change the genre, storyline, or focus of a film. For example, a comedy can be transformed into a thriller, or different movies can be combined to create a crossover that doesn‚Äôt exist. These edits allow fans to see their favorite actors and films in a whole new light.
By mixing and re-editing scenes, I aim to build excitement for upcoming releases, highlight unique ideas, and bring cinematic "what-if" scenarios to life. Since these are creative remixes, they may be protected under fair use.

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages ‚Äď including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal ‚Äď The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video‚Äôs video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures ‚Äď Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

snippet.title: Babli Badmaash - Lyrical Video | Priyanka Chopra, John Abraham | Sunidhi C | Shootout At Wadala
snippet.description:
Watch the lyrical video of Babli Badmaash from Shootout at Wadala, Featuring Priyanka Chopra alongside John Abraham, this high-energy track is sung by Sunidhi Chauhan with music composed by Anu Malik.

#bablibadmash #priyankachopra #johnabraham #sunidhichauhan #anumalik #shootoutatwadala 

Credits:
Song Name - Babli Badmaash
Movie - Shootout At Wadala
Singer - Sunidhi Chauhan
Composer - Anu Malik
Lyricists - Kumaar 
Music Label - Sony Music Entertainment India Pvt. Ltd.

Lyrics:
La la la la...
Aazmaa le... aaja tu saamne
Aazmaa le... aaja tu saamne
Dil parda-faash hai
Neeyat aiyyash hai
Na bann shareef tu, Babli badmaash hai
Babli badmash hai...
Na bann shareef tu, Babli badmaash hai

Aaja jalwon ke shaamiyane mein
Kya rakha hai zamaane mein Tu behlata hai, dil ko baaton se
Husn ko chhule aaj haathon se

Dil lagaa le aaja tu saamne
Dil parda-faash hai, neeyat aiyyash hai
Na bann shareef tu, Babli badmaash hai

Pyaas jaagi hai kitni raaton se
Aa bujha le hum behke jazbaaton se Na fursat ho saans lene ki
Bas khwahish ho pyaar dene ki

Dil jala le... aaja tu saamne
Dil parda-faash hai
Neeyat aiyyash hai
Na bann shareef tu, Babli badmaash hai
Babli badmash hai...
Na bann shareef tu, Babli badmaash hai

Audio on Sony Music Entertainment India Pvt. Ltd (C) 2026

snippet.title: Thaari Bhabhi (Official Video) | Sumit Parta | New Haryanvi Song 2026
snippet.description:
Thaari Bhabhi is about a man who left his rough life behind for the woman he loves. He used to find thrill in fights, but now he finds peace in her words. He is no longer a man of the streets, he is a man who stands proudly beside his wife. It shows that real strength is not about fighting; it is about loyalty, love, and growing up.

Credits:-
Song - Thaari Bhabhi
Singer / Lyrics - Sumit Parta
Music - Xtacy
Video - Jerry Batra
Editor - Cuts by Nav
DI - Fateh Sidhu
Production  - Ok Report Production

Lyrics:-
Duniya te ke lena
Maa Babu razi chahiye 
Roti pe laal mirch
Chaa mne taazi chahiye
Hakk te le jau
Koni court me byaun 
Mhare gate pe re jaan
Maine patde me bhati chahiye

Sare bhul gya vivad
Betha banke ne saad
Japu ram nam 
chodya isi chabi bharke

Mashoor the re kade barbadi karke
sudhre bethe hai thari bhabhi karke
Zindagi kharab sunu aadhi karke
Ib sudhre bethe hai thari bhabhi karke
Mashoor the re kade barbadi karke
sudhre bethe hai thari bhabhi karke
Zindagi kharab sunu aadhi karke
Ib sudhre bethe hai thari bhabhi karke

Jab likde yo chora shirt check paharke
Uki chuni kare hawa me ishare lehar ke
Nira kardu andhera ude banja dussehra 
Je koi baba thaan aaya tne chola pair ke

Hoya jad de re pyaar
Chode bethe hathiyaar
Ib sutta ki yo lyave
Chora gaadi bharke

Mashoor the re kade barbadi karke
sudhre bethe hai thari bhabhi karke
Zindagi kharab sunu aadhi karke
Ib sudhre bethe hai thari bhabhi karke
Mashoor the re kade barbadi karke
sudhre bethe hai thari bhabhi karke
Zindagi kharab sunu aadhi karke
Ib sudhre bethe hai thari bhabhi karke

Kade asle ke case kade 307
Par aaj kal pyari lage uski baat
Kade kade zee kare maardyu kisi ne
Par har bar rok leve uske haath

Na hon de galat
Rakhe bhole ke vrat
Betha diye re kaam
Jma sagi karke

Mashoor the re kade barbadi karke
sudhre bethe hai thari bhabhi karke

snippet.title: Khush Raho ‚Äď Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Khush Raho ‚Äď Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---

Mujhe udaas kar gaye ho‚Ä¶
khush raho.

Mera Dil Tod gaye ho‚Ä¶
khush raho.

Mere liye na ruk sake
to kya hua‚Ä¶
jahan kahin ruk gaye ho
khush raho.

‚ÄúKhush Raho‚ÄĚ
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo toot kar bhi
dua deta hai.

Is gaane mein
dard bhi hai,
sukoon bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai ‚ÄĒ

main tumhe bhool nahi paaya‚Ä¶
par phir bhi dua hai
tum hamesha khush raho.

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
khud se zyada chaha ho
aur phir use khushi ki dua di ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

snippet.title: License Ka Asla - Licence | Masoom Sharma | Amar Karnawal
snippet.description:
#Licence #Masoom #LicenceKaAsla
Presenting the second video from Masoom Sharma‚Äôs ‚ÄėLicence‚Äô! Composed and sung by Masoom Sharma, it is written by Amar Karnawal and producer by Pinna Music. 

#Licence #Masoom Sharma #LicenceKaAsla

Song name: Licence Ka Asla
Singer: Masoom Sharma
Music Composer: Masoom Sharma
Lyricist: Amar Karnawal
Music Producer: Pinna Music

Masoom Sharma & Shakuntalam Film Production ‚ÄėLicence‚Äô - Releasing On 24th April 2026 In Cinemas.

Star Cast - Masoom Sharma, Yashpal Sharma, Sapna Chaudhary, Kd Desi Rock, Rakhi  Lohchab, Nisha Sharma, Sunil Chitkara, Gori Nagori, Abhimanyu Yadav, Manish Kumar, Akash Chawaria, Kirti Satta, Rajkumar Dhankhar, Raman Nassa, Manvi Bhardwaj, Lucky Jahrila, Satish Georgy Kashyap, Ramesh Murti, Sid Sadanand, Deven Giroh, Narpender Sangwan, Satish Nandal, Divyansh Deshwal, Rahul Pandit, Jai Bhatia, Suren Savitri Sarkar, Ravinder Bajwan Anna, Sanju Hooda, Chirag Bansal, Samsher Singh Sam, Ashok Verma, Arpit, Nikki Dahiya, Desi Patarkar Dharmu, Anu Sardana.

Produced By - Shakuntlam Film Production
Writer & Director - Ranjeet Chauhan 
Associate Director - Girish Katyal 
Chief Assistant Director - Arshveer Khatrri 
D.O.P - Vikas K Sharma
Chief Assistant Ac - Shubam Saini
2nd Ac - Rohit Raj
Focus  Puller - Mohit Z
Editor - Hittarth Sardana
Sound Designer - Neeraj Rohilla 
Bgm - Dpon Dash
Creative Director - Vikash Kaushik
D.i - Nimesh
Music - Pinna, Thinker
Lyricist - Amar Karnawal, R One,jangii, Ajmer Balambiya  
Singer - Masoom Sharma, Rekha Goswami, Narender Bhagan, Swara Verma
Choreographer - Viren Chauhan
Executive  Producer - Abhimanyu Yadav
Production Manager - Suren Savitri Sarkar
Line Producer - Ravinder Bajwan Anna
Casting Director - Samsher Singh Sam
Art Director - Vishwjeet Sharma
Assistant Art Director - Harry Ranga
Costume Designer - Rajinder Kaur
Make Up - Mahip Kaur, Tripti Panchal
Sound Recordist - Ayush Behl
Fight Master - Vijay Lamba

Theatrical Distribution - Aanandah Pictures

Social Media Promotions - Un Reels

Lyrics:
Mahari ebbe sharafat dekhi sai fetange jis din bigdange , 
R mahrete k mahare saaye te bhi log ye darkai likdenge, 
Hum na hawabaaj r bande Or na chalchalan k gande r na karne faddu dhande baat sda syani rakhange 
Are dc n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 
Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande khani rakhange, 
Konya rhva kise t darkai rakha bandukhadi n bharkai, r jo sedhya uski karkai kunba ghaani rakhange... 

R jo khele khel jo loga n ve aapa khtam bnadyange, thamne to reel bnai se appa film bnadyange, 
Janta dekh k hoja bauli, barsai jb pital ki goli kheli jagi khoon ki holi pistal taani rakhange, 
Are dc n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 
Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande khani rakhange, 
Konya rhva kise t darkai rakha bandukhadi n bharkai, r jo sedhya uski karkai kunba ghaani rakhange... 

Are lehrande asle dikhenge r dikhenge sareaam bhagat, 
Bdhabad goli chalengi r chalengi sareaam bhagat, 
Re wepon khas mangau mota naam yamraj ka dhardu jhota kadhle goli khoon ek lota mot ki rani rakhenge, 
Are dc n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 

Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande khani rakhange, 
Konya rhva kise t darkai rakha bandukhadi n bharkai, r jo sedhya uski karkai kunba ghaani rakhange...

R jo khele khel jo loga n ve aapa khtam bnadyange, thamne to reel bnai se appa film bnadyange, 
Janta dekh k hoja bauli, barsai jb pital ki goli kheli jagi khoon ki holi pistal taani rakhange, 
Are dc n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 
Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande khani rakhange, 
Konya rhva kise t darkai rakha bandukhadi n bharkai, r jo sedhya uski karkai kunba ghaani rakhange... 

Are lehrande asle dikhenge r dikhenge sareaam bhagat, 
Bdhabad goli chalengi r chalengi sareaam bhagat, 
Re wepon khas mangau mota naam yamraj ka dhardu jhota kadhle goli khoon ek lota mot ki rani rakhenge, 
Are dc n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 

Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande khani rakhange, 
Konya rhva kise t darkai rakha bandukhadi n bharkai, r jo sedhya uski karkai kunba ghaani rakhange...

LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

en-US.description:
Baba Saheb Ambedkar Jayanti Special - Aalha Dr. Bhimrao Ambedkar - Aalha Bheemrao Ambedkar - Sanjo Baghel

ūüĒ∑ Baba Saheb Ambedkar Jayanti Special ūüĒ∑
Aalha - Dr. Bhimrao Ambedkar | Aalha Bheemrao Ambedkar | Sanjo Baghel

This special Aalha bhajan is presented on the birth anniversary of Dr. B. R. Ambedkar, India's great social reformer, architect of the Constitution, and messiah of the Dalits.

This bhajan presents Baba Saheb's struggle, sacrifice, and his great thoughts in musical form.

ūüé§ Singer: Sanjo Baghel
ūüé∂ Song: Aalha Bheemrao Ambedkar
ūüéß Genre: Aalha Folk Song
ūüôŹ Special: Ambedkar Jayanti Special

ūüďĆ In this bhajan, you will hear:
ūüĎČ The struggle of Baba Saheb's life
ūüĎČ The inspiration for equality and justice in society
ūüĎČ His contribution to education and rights

snippet.title: FALCON : Lakhi Ghuman | Jang Dhillon | Bhindder Burj | Latest Punjabi Songs 2026 | New Punjabi Song
snippet.description:
ūüĒ• FALCON ‚Äď Lakhi Ghuman ūüĒ•

Presenting the official track *‚ÄúFALCON‚ÄĚ* by **Lakhi Ghuman**, a powerful song that brings high-energy vibes, bold lyrics, and a striking visual experience. This track captures attitude, ambition, and the fearless spirit of rising above all limits‚ÄĒjust like a falcon soaring in the sky. ūü¶Ö

Singer and Composer: Lakhi Ghuman
Lyrics: Jang Dhillon
Music: Hammy Mangat
Mix and Master: Dense
Story, Screenplay and Director: Bhindder Burj
DOP: Jason Numberdar
Associate: Pal Mahla 
Chief AD: Gurie Madahar, Mani DC, Akash Sandhu
Art: Rajan Arts
Jib Operater: Munish
Costume: Rajat Manchanda
Editor: Cuts by Nav
Colorist: Fateh Sidhu

Label: LeafRecords 
Email: info@leafrecords.ca

ūüĎČ Don‚Äôt forget to Like, Comment & Share
ūüĎČ Subscribe for more latest Punjabi music

#Falcon #LakhiGhuman #LeafRecords #PunjabiMusic #NewSong #TrendingNow #MusicVideo


FALCON : Lakhi Ghuman | Jang Dhillon | Bhindder Burj | Latest Punjabi Songs 2026 | New Punjabi Songs 2026

#newpunjabisong #latestpunjabisongs 

Song Lyrics

Aayu russia ton fauj hona yudh jiddne
Khoon naal ghoreyan de pour bhijjne 
Vidhi da vidhaan kehda taalu kalnu 
Sees sidhe hongey guraan de vall nu 
Yodheya nu dhuro jadon haaka vajjiyan 
Tanka vangu aungiya range aan laddiya 
Degh tegh fateh da jaikaara gunjuga 
Sikh raaj dekheyo dbaara gunjuga 
Dj aan te santaan di speech chalugi 
Rani jinda chithiyan dbaare ghallugi 
Ladhi fer dulla jammu taahli naalda
Hoyu jathedaar phoola seyon akalli naalda 
Kamm laye jaangey kanoon sakht ton
Dand ditte jaangey akal takht ton
Kalyug vahno vaahni doud jauga 
Jaffi poun jagrawa nu lahore ayuga 
Hikk thok kehne a sure ayuga 
Dahdeyan dmalleyan da dor aauga........3x

Murh parne te pagga dihniyaa panjab nu 
Har dhoun jhukugi nishaan sahib nu 
Laike daang naal kohinoor taj aungey
Bahron chobra de bhre hoye jhaaj aungey 
Gutta te sarbh loh de karhe hongey 
Drawing room asle naal bhare hongey 
Raj laine jaane saddi koum kinga di 
Bordera te fouj hoyu nihang singha di 
Oye boond v ni dinde vicho sadde paaniya 
Har banda kanth karu panj baaniya 
Pairan thalle choudra jwani middugi 
Ghro ghri chulleya te degh rijjugi 
Jagngey chehre anna jor ayuga
Ik do ni khalsa crore auga 
Kyunki ajj de sme di vaddi lorh ayuga 
Dahdeyan dmalleyan da daur ayuga .....3x 

O do ghari dekh jihnu sher darje 
Honey kadd kirdaar naluye de argey 
Hun jadon hoyi honi jang end di 
Parhke turangey vaar banda singh di 
Jis vele yudh da biggal gajj geya 
Os wele dsangey ki time vajgeya
Hr maa da putt urha joorha sahmbuga 
Kesri te rang neela goorha sambhuga 
Aayu oho time jehda mitt hunda si 
Goreya de tera sadda ik hunda si 
Raj hona sadda saddey rule hongey 
Sikhi de sidhanta te school hongey 
Kdo kiwe hoya si birth dsangey 
Asal akali de arth dsangey 
Murhpey ghara nu jadon putt morhe te 
Din charey kharkhra firu ghorey te 
.........

O nwe munde jadon kissa kaav parhgey 
Jamngey fer jagge jeoney varge
Raggi dhadhi jadon sikh raj goungey 
Charhtey de potrey jhe yaad aungey 
Kisse parsang lohri maghi sunage 
Deya singh dilbar dhadi sunage 
Sukhe jinde yodheya de mele laawage 
Bhai nirmal choley ali jaggo gawangey 
Raja oh nikamma jihda raj na rawe
Kaum kaahdi jihda raaj bhaag na rwe
Aisa jang dhillon likhi ke anand a jwe 
Sunke sareero looyi kandeya jwe 
Hor kinne likhngey tenu dekhke
Rakh tu purhainiya kalam ret ke 
Sach jadon likhe ithihaas hongey 
Fer asal azadi de ehsaas hongey 
Pata lagju smey nu koohni morh ayuga 
Dekhi hathi ali turya oh tor ayuga 
Jehda khalsa a raj o pure ayuga ......

snippet.title: I MUST FEED THE HOLE!
snippet.description:
Wassup Gamers,

Today I will be playing a horror creepy hole game called Berry Bury Berry. It's a new game where we have to grow berries, place them in a hole and make money! But something is very very wrong with this hole.

Thumbnail Inspiration : @8-BitRyan   

Follow Me On EVERYWHERE! *Not on streets please :')*
Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/imbixu/

Lyrics:
Surmedani warga eh mera mahi
Te hor mainu ki chahida
Surmedani‚Ä¶.
Ohdi paerr chaal suna jad jad v
Maithon bolya na janda ik vaak v
Oh v maukke di nazakat pachaan ke
Sayeon chup kar janda odon aap v
Jado akhiyan da noor howe saawein
Dupatta siron nhiyon lahida 
Surmedani warga eh mera mahi
Te hor mainu ki chahida
Surmedani‚Ä¶.

Ohde khyalan diyan pattna te bethi nu
Haye din charde toh pai jandi shaam ni
Utton kuriyan de kaalje machaun nu
Main ohda bullan utte rakhdi aa naam ni
Jado hilda na patta kise paase
Haye odon oda geet gaida
Surmedani warga eh mera mahi
Te hor mainu ki chahida
Surmedani‚Ä¶.

Ohde pyaran wala odan bathera eh
Mai kade mehanga leera paya koi khaas ni
Ni mainu maapeyan di yaad aun dindi na
haye odon mukhon jehri duldi mithaas ni
puri dharti de maech da hi lagge 
hun ghera wang di gulai da
Surmedani warga eh mera mahi
Te hor mainu ki chahida.   Surmedani‚Ä¶.

#cidnewepisode2025  #cidnews #cid2026 
#cidepisode #ŗ§łŗ•Äŗ§Üŗ§ąŗ§°ŗ•Ä #cid2025 #crimethrillershow #mysteries  #newcid  #crime  #newcid  #latestcid  #sonywah  #crimeandmystery
#cidepisode #cidtvshow #CID #crimeshow  #investigations  #detectivedrama  #indiantvshow  #suspense  #mystery  #crimeinvestigation  #daya  #shivajisatam  #acppradyuman 

Show Name: CID  

Cast & Characters: 
‚ÄĘ Shivaji Satam as ACP Pradyuman
‚ÄĘ Dinesh Phadnis as Inspector Fredricks aka Freddy 
‚ÄĘ Ashutosh Gowariker as Sr. Inspector Virendra 
‚ÄĘ Dayanand Shetty as Sr. Inspector Daya 
‚ÄĘ Narendra Gupta as Dr. R. P. Salunkhe 
‚ÄĘ Aditya Srivastava as Sr. Inspector Abhijeet 
‚ÄĘ Shraddha Musale as Dr. Tarika 
‚ÄĘ Ansha Sayed as Sub-Inspector Purvi 
‚ÄĘ Producer: Brijendra Pal Singh 

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is one of the most popular shows on Crime File Case. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [ played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam ]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. The plot throws up intriguing twists and turns at every stage to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

#cidepisode #ŗ§łŗ•Äŗ§Üŗ§ąŗ§°ŗ•Ä #cid2025 #crimethrillershow #mysteries  #newcid  #crime  #newcid  #latestcid  #sonywah  #crimeandmystery

Show Name: CID  

Cast & Characters: 
‚ÄĘ Shivaji Satam as ACP Pradyuman
‚ÄĘ Dinesh Phadnis as Inspector Fredricks aka Freddy 
‚ÄĘ Ashutosh Gowariker as Sr. Inspector Virendra 
‚ÄĘ Dayanand Shetty as Sr. Inspector Daya 
‚ÄĘ Narendra Gupta as Dr. R. P. Salunkhe 
‚ÄĘ Aditya Srivastava as Sr. Inspector Abhijeet 
‚ÄĘ Shraddha Musale as Dr. Tarika 
‚ÄĘ Ansha Sayed as Sub-Inspector Purvi 
‚ÄĘ Producer: Brijendra Pal Singh 

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is one of the most popular shows on Crime File Case. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [ played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam ]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. The plot throws up intriguing twists and turns at every stage to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

Show Name: CID  

Cast & Characters: 
‚ÄĘ Shivaji Satam as ACP Pradyuman
‚ÄĘ Dinesh Phadnis as Inspector Fredricks aka Freddy 
‚ÄĘ Ashutosh Gowariker as Sr. Inspector Virendra 
‚ÄĘ Dayanand Shetty as Sr. Inspector Daya 
‚ÄĘ Narendra Gupta as Dr. R. P. Salunkhe 
‚ÄĘ Aditya Srivastava as Sr. Inspector Abhijeet 
‚ÄĘ Shraddha Musale as Dr. Tarika 
‚ÄĘ Ansha Sayed as Sub-Inspector Purvi 
‚ÄĘ Producer: Brijendra Pal Singh 

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is one of the most popular shows on Crime File Case. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [ played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam ]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. The plot throws up intriguing twists and turns at every stage to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

snippet.title: Jonathan Launches Team Apex Gaming - Full Story, GodLike Exit & What's Next
snippet.description:
Jonathan launched Team Apex Gaming on April 12, 2026. His own esports org. #TAGonTOP. Full breakdown of the announcement, the GodLike exit and what's coming next.

The announcement video wasn't what you'd expect. No roster reveal, no logo animation first. Jonathan talked about his life. First phone, first wins, buying his dad a car. Broke it into levels ‚ÄĒ starting out, grinding, reaching the top. Then said he needs to grow more to represent his community globally. Last line: "Team Apex Gaming is here to be on top."

Here's the part most people missed. Weeks before the announcement he activated an Instagram page called blackheartontop. No branding. No roster. Just a page. It crossed 300K followers before anything was even officially announced. No marketing budget, no teaser campaign. Just Jonathan's name attached to it.

GodLike exit timeline for anyone catching up. Kronten said Jonathan told him about leaving 3-4 months before BGIS 2026. Got benched at BGIS for the first time in his career. Strategic decision according to captain Manya, Jonathan confirmed it himself too. GodLike topped Survival Stage with that lineup, finished 5th at Chennai Grand Finals. Jonathan played all 18 Grand Finals matches though. 31 finishes. Most on his team. Posted about "new changes" on Instagram after the tournament. Confirmed the rumours on a livestream days later.

TAG debuts at BMPS 2026, starting May. Not a soft launch either ‚ÄĒ EWC 2026 slots are on the line at BMPS. First tournament and the pressure is already at the top.

Word is the org won't stop at BGMI. Plans for Honor of Kings and MOBA Legends 5v5 entries. Both titles have EWC slots. Content creators might come under the TAG banner too eventually.

23 years old. Left the biggest safety net in Indian BGMI. Started his own thing. Could work out, could not. But the 300K followers before launch and the fact that the entire community is watching tells you the bet isn't crazy.

Like, Share & Subscribe for Team Apex Gaming updates, BMPS 2026 coverage & BGMI esports news!

#TeamApexGaming #TAGonTOP #Jonathan #jonathangaming  #BGMI #GodLike #BMPS2026 #EWC2026 #BGMIEsports #JonathanNewOrg #ApexGaming #indianesports

Broke it into levels ‚ÄĒ starting out, grinding, reaching the top. Then said he needs to grow more to represent his community globally. Last line: "Team Apex Gaming is here to be on top."

Here's the part most people missed. Weeks before the announcement he activated an Instagram page called blackheartontop. No branding. No roster. Just a page. It crossed 300K followers before anything was even officially announced. No marketing budget, no teaser campaign. Just Jonathan's name attached to it.

GodLike exit timeline for anyone catching up. Kronten said Jonathan told him about leaving 3-4 months before BGIS 2026. Got benched at BGIS for the first time in his career. Strategic decision according to captain Manya, Jonathan confirmed it himself too. GodLike topped Survival Stage with that lineup, finished 5th at Chennai Grand Finals. Jonathan played all 18 Grand Finals matches though. 31 finishes. Most on his team. Posted about "new changes" on Instagram after the tournament. Confirmed the rumours on a livestream days later.

TAG debuts at BMPS 2026, starting May. Not a soft launch either ‚ÄĒ EWC 2026 slots are on the line at BMPS. First tournament and the pressure is already at the top.

Word is the org won't stop at BGMI. Plans for Honor of Kings and MOBA Legends 5v5 entries. Both titles have EWC slots. Content creators might come under the TAG banner too eventually.

23 years old. Left the biggest safety net in Indian BGMI. Started his own thing. Could work out, could not. But the 300K followers before launch and the fact that the entire community is watching tells you the bet isn't crazy.

snippet.title: All Stars Showdown | 1v1s & More | Road To Finals
snippet.description:
The Grand Finals at Gandhinagar are almost here, but before the biggest stage of TEZ FFMIC Spring 2026, we settle some scores first. 

Welcome to the Road to Finals Special Stream, where the best players in India go head to head in exclusive 1v1 showdowns, All Stars chaos, and YOU get to decide who plays alongside the legends. This is not just a warm-up. This is personal.

Four battles. Zero mercy. Who walks away with the bragging rights before Gandhinagar?

Four Team Captains. Eight of India's best competing players. One All Stars battleground.

Vote LIVE on stream and decide which team your favourite legacy player joins. Your vote shapes the game.

BABA BHOLENATH


Ho Pagla Ki Dahla Meri Hori Se Dasha 
Ib 24 Ghante Baba Me To Karu Su Nasha 
Khel Khelgi Anokha 
Baba Degi Mne Dhokha 
Sacha Milda Ni Pyar Ishe Challe Holiye 
Uskhe Hotha Aali Laali Baba Lage Thi Kasoot 
Mere Pi Pi Ke Chillam Hoth Kaale Holiye 

Ho Aaj Bhi Va Baba Mere Dil Me Dhadke 
Jo Saal Pahla Gayi Thi Mere Te Ladke 
Futhe Pyar Ke Gubaare 
Hum Hoge Nyare Nyare 
Jiski Khugi Rr Chabi Ishe Taale Holiye 
Uskhe Hotha Aali Laali Baba Lage Thi Kasoot 
Mere Pi Pi Chillam Hoth Kaale Holiye 

Ib Ganje Aali Pudiya Me Rakhu Gooj Me 
Nasha Lagya Me Karn Baba Heavy Dose Me 
Konya Karu Intzaar 
Hoya Nashe Te Yo Pyar 
Ib Babya Jise Baba Mere Khyal Holiye 
Uskhe Hotha Aali Laali Baba Lage Thi Kasoot 
Mere Pi Pi Chillam Hoth Kaale Holiye

snippet.title: Guruvayurappa Full Video Song - Pudhu Pudhu Arthangal | SPB, KS Chithra | Ilaiyaraaja Hits
snippet.description:
Watch the devotional and melodious ‚ÄúGuruvayurappa‚ÄĚ HD Video Song from Pudhu Pudhu Arthangal, streaming exclusively on SPE Music India YouTube Channel. The song is beautifully rendered by S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and K. S. Chithra, delivering a spiritually uplifting musical experience.

Directed by K. Balachander, the film stars Rahman, Geetha, Sithara, Sowcar Janaki, and Jayachitra.

The song is composed by Ilaiyaraaja and is musically inspired by the Abheri raga, giving it a devotional and classical tone. Lyrics by Vaali beautifully enhance the spiritual theme of the song.

Starcast

Rahman, Geetha, Sithara, Sowcar Janaki, Jayachithra & Others

Movie Technicians

Director: K Balachander
Producer: Kavithalayaa Productions Private Limited
Music: Ilaiyaraaja
Lyrics: Vaali
